stem: What is the prime objective of fact-finding?

options.A: To identify what financial-planning needs the client has and quantify each need, the existing provision and the shortfall
options.B: To sell the client the product with the highest commission
options.C: To complete the company's administrative records only
options.D: To confirm the client's identity for anti-money-laundering purposes

explanation: 教材 1.1 指出事实调查的首要目标是识别客户的财务规划需求,并量化每项需求总额、既有保障与缺口。其余选项均非首要目标。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — s.1.1

stem: Under FAA-N16, which three aspects must a Financial Adviser Representative who makes recommendations comply with?

options.B: Know your client, conduct needs analysis, and complete documentation and record keeping
options.D: Risk pooling, premium rating and policy issuance

explanation: 教材 2.3 列明 FAA-N16 要求代表做到:了解你的客户、进行需求分析、完成文档与记录保存。其他选项与该通知的三要求无关。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — s.2.3; FAA-N16

stem: Section 4b (Client Knowledge Assessment) of the Life Insurance Advisory Form must be completed when advice is given for which products?

options.A: Any product with a cash value
options.B: General insurance and personal accident policies
options.D: Term insurance with no investment element

explanation: 教材 3.7 指出:Section 4a(投资风险概况)在为有现金价值产品提供建议时须完成,而 Section 4b(客户知识评估)在为非上市特定投资产品(SIP)提供建议时须完成。A 对应 4a,B、D 不触发知识评估。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — s.3.7, s.7.5

stem: Except for which section must the representative take the client through every section of the Life Insurance Advisory Form?

options.D: Section 4 – Investment Profile, which is product-type specific

explanation: 教材 3.6 指出,除产品类型特定的“第4节投资概况”外,须带客户走过每一节;客户不愿提供信息时须清楚记录其决定。其余各节均须走过。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — s.3.6

stem: A 10-year-old boy is the client's dependant. Using the rule of thumb in the chapter, how many 'years to support' should be recorded?
explanation: 教材 5.14 指出男孩用 25 减当前年龄(完成高等教育之龄),即 25 − 10 = 15 年。女孩则用 22 减当前年龄。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — s.5.14

stem: The Life Insurance Advisory Form recommends a client be accompanied by a Trusted Individual if he belongs to how many of the listed profiles (aged 62 or above; not proficient in English; secondary education or below)?
explanation: 教材 5.16 指出,客户若属三项概况中的任意两项即建议由信任个人陪同。陪同非强制(5.17),由客户选择,故 D 错。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — s.5.16–5.17

stem: An income-protection (disability income) policy typically covers a maximum of what percentage of the insured's income?
explanation: 教材 8.3 与 15.55 指出,收入保障/伤残收入保单通常最高覆盖收入的 75%,且给付还会被其他伤残保险或雇主续付收入抵减。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — s.8.3, s.15.55

stem: In the assets-and-liabilities analysis, a client whose total liabilities exceed his total assets has a negative net asset position. According to the chapter, such a client is considered:
explanation: 教材 9.14 明确指出,若客户净资产头寸为负,他被视为破产(bankrupt)。净资产头寸=总资产−总负债。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — s.9.13–9.14

stem: To pass the Client Knowledge Assessment based on Investment Experience, a client must have transacted in a Collective Investment Scheme or ILP how many times within the last three years?
explanation: 教材 7.8 指出投资经验标准为过去三年内在集合投资计划(如单位信托)或 ILP 中交易至少六次。客户只需满足三项标准(学历、投资经验、工作经验)之一即通过。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — s.7.6–7.8

stem: When insuring a dependant's life, what does the chapter advise the representative to attach whenever the insurer allows it?

options.B: A payor's benefit rider, so the policy does not lapse on the client's death or disability

explanation: 教材 15.29 指出,为受养人投保时应尽量附加“缴款人利益附约(payor's benefit rider)”,以确保客户身故或伤残时保单不致失效。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — s.15.29

stem: According to Dr Thomas Gordon, good listening requires three conditions. Which statement correctly reflects the chapter?

options.A: Acceptance is not agreement, empathy is not sympathy, and genuineness is not sensitivity
options.B: Acceptance means agreement, and empathy means sympathy
options.C: The three conditions are speed, accuracy and brevity
options.D: Genuineness requires the listener to share his own opinions first

explanation: 教材 14.6 指出良好倾听的三条件为接纳、同理与真诚,且接纳不是同意、同理不是同情、真诚不是敏感。B、C、D 均与教材相悖。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — s.14.6

stem: When dealing with an unhappy or angry client during fact-finding, the chapter suggests the representative should:

options.A: Use only leading questions to steer the client
options.B: Avoid asking any questions until the next meeting
options.D: Use open questions first to let him express his feelings, then shift to closed questions to focus on specifics

explanation: 教材 14.14 指出,面对不悦或愤怒的客户应先用开放式问题让其宣泄情绪,待其平静后再转用封闭式问题以聚焦具体答案。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — s.14.13–14.14

stem: From which date did MediShield Life replace MediShield, and whom does it cover?

options.A: From 1 April 2015; covering only Singapore Citizens
options.B: From 1 November 2015; covering all Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents
options.C: From 1 January 2016; covering employees with group cover only
options.D: From 20 May 2015; covering those born in 1980 onwards

explanation: 教材 15.44 指出 MediShield Life 自 2015-11-01 取代 MediShield,覆盖全体新加坡公民与永久居民,涵盖大额住院及部分昂贵门诊。D 中“1980 年及以后出生”是 CareShield Life 的覆盖范围(15.47),勿混淆。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — s.15.44, s.15.47

stem: Where the purchaser is the client's trustee (e.g. a caregiver or donee safeguarding funds for a beneficiary), what does the chapter say about the appropriate product risk profile?

options.A: It should match the trustee's own risk appetite
options.B: It should be high to maximise returns for the beneficiary
options.C: The entire risk profile of the product should be low
options.D: There are no constraints, since the trustee decides freely

explanation: 教材 16.9 指出,因受托人为受益人保管资金,产品的整体风险概况应为低;若受托人对其受信责任不安,把资金留在储蓄存款而非承担产品风险可能更佳。
sourceRef: RES 5 Study Text Part II Ch.22 — s.16.9
